user_story: As an Employee, I want to select a financial year on the My Exemptions screen, so that I can view exemptions for that tax period.
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the My Exemptions screen; When I choose a financial year; Then the exemptions list is filtered to that period

user_story: As an Employee, I want to view my exemption records with type, applicable dates and monthly amount, so that I can confirm the exemptions applied to my salary.
acceptance_criteria: Given exemptions exist for the selected year; When the list loads; Then each row shows exemption type, applicable from, applicable to and amount (monthly)

user_story: As an Employee, I want to refresh the exemptions list, so that I always see the latest saved data.
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the My Exemptions screen; When I click refresh; Then the exemptions list reloads with current data

user_story: As an Employee, I want clear feedback when no exemptions are recorded, so that I know there is nothing to review for the selected year.
acceptance_criteria: Given no exemptions exist for the selected year; When the list loads; Then a "No records to display" message is shown
